title: Thunder, Perfect Mind
goal: Accuracy-first translation prep focused on preserving paradox, cadence, and antithetical voice.

cross_reference_strategy.notes: Keep the poem's self-contradictory pairings visible and reviewable.

primary_witnesses.notes: Primary Coptic facsimile witness from Nag Hammadi Codex VI, tractate 2. OCR target pages 13-21 (the preserved tractate span). OCR completed 2026-04-22 via Vertex-backed Gemini 3.1 Pro using the same crop box (0.16,0.03,0.84,0.97) and 6-band page assembly. One Vertex credential (`/cartha/vertex/gemini-sa`) returned a billing 403 during Thunder smoke tests, so production OCR used `/cartha/vertex/gemini-sa-2`.
English translation / interpretation witness only; not a Coptic-script primary source. Primary online Phase E witness for Thunder, Perfect Mind.

guardrails: Preserve every paradoxical pair instead of smoothing contradictions into paraphrase.
Retain the repeated "I am" cadence where the witness supports it.
If a line becomes smoother but less strange, prefer the stranger but more faithful rendering.
